overview: DreamAdmit is a comprehensive college admissions platform with AI guidance, scholarship search, college comparison, smart planning, mental health support, and career mapping for students worldwide.
features: AI-powered college match scores and guidance
Smart planning dashboard with 4-year high school planner
Mental health and wellness tracker with daily mood check-ins
After admission prep with checklists and guides
Career and future mapper with salary comparisons
Admission officer portal with analytics and recruitment tools
Plans page with all subscription tiers
International college search with visa guidance
